title: justicia niokolo-kobae
intro: Justicia niokolo-kobae, also known as the Niokolo-Koba Justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Justicia niokolo-kobae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
